description: "Well, there's a baby inside of me," the "White Lotus" actress shared on an upcoming episode of the "Smartless" podcast.

title: ‘Euphoria’ Star Chloe Cherry Says Sam Levinson Wanted the Drug Balloon Swallowing Scenes To Be “Absolutely Disgusting”: “I Need It To Be Just Awful”
description: "He was like, 'I really, really, really need to see in the scene that it is absolutely disgusting to swallow these fentanyl balloons."

title: The Hormuz Crisis
description: Free navigation of the strait should be nonnegotiable.

title: Pope Leo responds to Trump following his criticism over the Iran war
description: President Trump criticized Pope Leo XIV on Sunday over the pontiff's comments regarding the Iran war, saying, "he's a man that doesn't believe in stopping crime." On Monday, the pope responded to the president, saying in part "too many innocent people are being killed."

title: Roblox introduces age-based accounts amid child safety concerns
description: The California-based company said it will assign users ages 5 to 8 to a Roblox Kids account and users ages 9 to 15 to a separate account called Roblox Select.

title: Sam Altman says "we should deescalate the rhetoric" after home hit with Molotov cocktail
description: Sam Altman, the CEO of OpenAI, shared a personal blog post and photo of his family saying, "In the hopes that it might dissuade the next person from throwing a Molotov cocktail at our house, no matter what they think of me," following an attack outside his home last week. Altman suggested the incident was connected to the broader debate over AI, saying, "we should deescalate the rhetoric and tactics."

title: Premier League soccer player killed in attack on team bus in Ghana
description: Dominic Frimpong was killed after the team's bus was attacked by a group of suspected armed robbers, officials said Monday.

title: U.S. stocks set to sink, oil prices rise amid Trump's blockade plan
description: Global oil prices jumped over $100 a barrel as investors fret over Trump's threat to launch a partial naval blockade of the vital trade route.

title: Texts show American missing in Bahamas told friend about concerns in her marriage in 2024
description: Lynette Hooker, the missing American in the Bahamas, told a friend about concerns in her marriage to Brian Hooker back in 2024, text messages obtained by CBS News show. Brian Hooker, who told police his wife fell overboard on their boat, was arrested in connection to her disappearance. He has denied any wrongdoing.

title: Pope Pushes Back Against Trump in Feud Over Iran War
description: The fallout over the Iran war has extended to a clash between President Donald Trump and Pope Leo XIV, after the pontiff voiced his concerns about the United States-led military campaign. Trump harshly criticized him, saying "he's a very liberal person" and later calling him "terrible for foreign policy" in a social media post. Now the Pope is pushing back saying, “I have no fear of either the Trump administration, or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, that’s what I believe I

title: CPC PAC endorses Chris Rabb in Pennsylvania House primary
description: The Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC) PAC announced Monday that it’s backing state Rep. Chris Rabb (D) ahead of the May Democratic primary for Pennsylvania’s 3rd Congressional District.  “Pennsylvania state Representative Chris Rabb is a social justice activist, an educator who helped unionize 1,500 adjunct professors and a legislator who has taken on Republicans and the billionaire class to create a democracy…

title: Stocks can rally even without a ‘full return to normality,’ says HSBC
description: There’s too much focus from investors on the war in Iran, analysts led by Max Kettner wrote in a note.

title: Issa Rae says DEI has become a 'bad word' in Hollywood as executives of color 'tiptoe' to keep jobs
description: Actress Issa Rae said diversity has become a toxic topic in Hollywood, with studios rolling back DEI initiatives and people scared to invest in diverse projects.

title: Trump congratulates Rory McIlroy on back-to-back Masters wins: 'Becoming more and more a legend'
description: President Donald Trump congratulated Rory McIlroy on winning the 90th Masters Tournament, calling him a legend who performed tremendously under intense pressure.

title: Ranking the top 10 cornerbacks in the 2026 NFL Draft
description: The Post’s Ryan Dunleavy gives his top 10 cornerbacks in this year’s NFL draft, based on evaluations and conversations with people around the league.
